query: 'phase' was not described as one of our issues, as it is very specifically defined in our protocol files... the claude.md changes are OK... EXCEPT for the phase descriptors.  THe ONLY place they should be used is with the specific context_cycle queries and those do not seem to be a problem.  Our problems have been in storing content and retrieving content... I'm suspicious of our skill definitions.  In addition, we made changes yesterday to our protogols and agent definitions that seem to be gone... these actually included and repositioned context_briefing in some agents that no longer seem to be there.. this is what you should check first.  do not make changes... just research
